_comment: Example of a single activity containing tasks with document links.
_usage: Use search_documents to find document UUIDs, then place them in DocumentUniqueId.
_important: Document links go at the TASK level, not the activity level. Each task can link to ONE document or ONE sub-process, not both.

Task._comment: Task with a document link — agent fills DocumentUniqueId from search_documents result
Task.Text: Complete the Privacy Impact Assessment form

Task._comment: Task with a note (HasNote: true, Note contains guidance text)
Task.Text: Obtain legal sign-off on data handling clauses
Task.Note: If the supplier is based outside the country, escalate to the Chief Privacy Officer before proceeding.

Task._comment: Plain task — no document, no subprocess, no note
Task.Text: File completed forms in the document management system
